creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Thu Dec 19 14:14:28 2013
New Revision: 336915
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/336915

Log:
  - Fix build with clang
  - Add LICENSE
  - Add desktop entry file
  - Support staging
  
  PR:		pors/184815
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>

Added:
  head/graphics/graphopt/files/patch-src__classes__dotImporter.cc   (contents, props changed)
  head/graphics/graphopt/files/patch-src__classes__nodes.cc   (contents, props changed)
  head/graphics/graphopt/files/patch-src__classes__optFileReader.cc   (contents, props changed)
  head/graphics/graphopt/files/patch-src__classes__optFileWriter.cc   (contents, props changed)
  head/graphics/graphopt/files/patch-src__classes__visioExporter.cc   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/graphics/graphopt/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/graphics/graphopt/files/patch-src:classes:psExporter.cc   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/graphics/graphopt/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/graphics/graphopt/Makefile	Thu Dec 19 14:11:30 2013	(r336914)
+++ head/graphics/graphopt/Makefile	Thu Dec 19 14:14:28 2013	(r336915)
@@ -3,16 +3,19 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	graphopt
 PORTVERSION=	0.4.1
-PORTREVISION=	5
+PORTREVISION=	6
 CATEGORIES=	graphics
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/v${PORTVERSION}
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	Graph Layout Optimizer
+COMMENT=	Graph layout optimizer
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv2 # (or later)
 
 USE_GNOME=	gtk12
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
+DESKTOP_ENTRIES="GraphOpt" "" "" "${PORTNAME}" "Graphics;GTK;" ""
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/graphics/graphopt/files/patch-src:classes:psExporter.cc
==============================================================================
--- head/graphics/graphopt/files/patch-src:classes:psExporter.cc	Thu Dec 19 14:11:30 2013	(r336914)
+++ head/graphics/graphopt/files/patch-src:classes:psExporter.cc	Thu Dec 19 14:14:28 2013	(r336915)
@@ -1,10 +1,13 @@
 --- src/classes/psExporter.cc.orig	Mon Aug  9 09:31:11 2004
 +++ src/classes/psExporter.cc	Mon Aug  9 09:31:38 2004
-@@ -23,13 +23,13 @@ void psExporter::do_export() {
-    fclose(outfile);
- }
+@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
+ #include "psExporter.h"
++#include <cstdlib>
  
  
+ psExporter::psExporter(char *what_file, nodes *what_nodes) {
+@@ -26,7 +27,7 @@
+ 
  void psExporter::write_headers(FILE *outfile) {
     char *line = new char[200];
 -   sprintf(line, "\%!PS-Adobe-1.0\n%%%%BoundingBox: 0 0 %d %d\n%%%%DocumentFonts: Helvetica\n%%%%Pages: 1\n",
@@ -12,6 +15,3 @@
             translatexcoord((double) biggest_x) + 2 * margin,
             translateycoord((double) biggest_y) + 2 * margin);
     fwrite(line, strlen(line), 1, outfile);
-    delete line;
- }
-
